artifact.title: Landometer Design System v0.8.6 — Adoption Decision Demo

decision.requested: Gate A: approve v0.8.6 as the candidate shared language for four task-scoped roles and conditionally authorize a two-week pilot on one CityMETER decision flow after Day-0 gates are complete; this is not broad rollout.
decision.reviewPoint: Gate B at the end of the two-week pilot

experience.trigger: The four task-scoped roles need to decide whether to run a bounded v0.8.6 adoption pilot.
experience.oneJob: See how one governed object changes role work, then review Gate A.
experience.firstAha: No current result, source gap, decision boundary, and next evidence check are visible without an invented value.
experience.primaryAction: start with my role; local navigation only
experience.nextUsefulAction: open the readiness evidence checklist; local disclosure only
experience.cleanCompletion: review Gate A and carry the static handoff recipe into the pilot

capabilities.authenticationScope: no application-level authentication; repository source is public by current user instruction

records.label: Marketing
records.oneJob: pair a benefit with status and limitation

records.label: Design
records.oneJob: make hierarchy, state, and recovery legible

records.label: Development
records.oneJob: make state and token rules testable

governedObject.classification: design-system fixture in a CityMETER context; no claim of current product behavior
governedObject.boundary: must not be used for a real decision
